rule_metadata.author: Corissa Koopmans, '@corissalea'
rule_metadata.title: New CA Policy by Non-approved Actor

rules.rule_text:
title: New CA Policy by Non-approved Actor
id: 0922467f-db53-4348-b7bf-dee8d0d348c6
status: test
description: Monitor and alert on conditional access changes.
references:
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/entra/architecture/security-operations-infrastructure
author: Corissa Koopmans, '@corissalea'
date: 2022-07-18
tags:
- attack.privilege-escalation
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1548
logsource:
  product: azure
  service: auditlogs
detection:
  selection:
    properties.message: Add conditional access policy
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Misconfigured role permissions
- Verify whether the user identity, user agent, and/or hostname should be making changes
  in your environment.
level: medium
